name: lab-result
title: Lab Result
description: Single lab value with unit, reference range, flag badge, and range bar; LabPanel groups rows under a collected date.

props.name: flag
props.description: Derived from the range when omitted; critical is never derived — pass it explicitly.

props.name: showRangeBar
props.description: Horizontal range bar with a marker at the value.

props.name: collectedDate
props.description: LabPanel: when the sample was collected.

clinicalNotes: below/above flags are derived from the reference range, but `critical` never is — critical thresholds are analyte-specific and lab-defined, so the component refuses to guess; pass it explicitly from your LIS flags. The range bar is decorative (aria-hidden) and clamps the marker 20% beyond the range; the value, unit, and reference range are always present as text, and each flag badge carries a visually-hidden announcement ("above reference range"). Always show units — a potassium of 6.8 means nothing without mmol/L. Reference ranges vary by lab, age, sex, and pregnancy: display the range that came with the result, not a hardcoded one.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Exports LabResultRow + LabPanel.
